name: RNA-FM
description: Extract embeddings from RNA sequences using pretrained foundation model. Predict RNA secondary structure and base-pairing probabilities. Trained on 23M+ non-coding RNA sequences via self-supervised learning. mRNA-FM variant available for mRNA coding sequences.
capabilities: Extract embeddings from RNA sequences using pretrained foundation model
Predict RNA secondary structure and base-pairing probabilities
Trained on 23M+ non-coding RNA sequences via self-supervised learning
mRNA-FM variant available for mRNA coding sequences

sequence.description: RNA nucleotide sequence (A, U, G, C) for secondary structure prediction and embedding extraction

modelVariant.description: Model variant: rna-fm for non-coding RNA, mrna-fm for mRNA coding sequences
